---
name: Feature request
description: Propose a new capability or behavior change.
title: "feat(scope): concise feature summary"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: "@me"
---

<!-- User need or workflow gap. -->

<!-- Desired behavior and user-facing result. -->

## Alternatives

<!-- Other approaches considered, including doing nothing. -->

  - <!-- Concrete behavior/docs/tests. -->
- Out of scope:
  - <!-- Non-goals. -->

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Tests/docs updated as needed
- [ ] `mise run check` passes or exception documented
